[@lynx-js/react](/api/react/index.mdx) / useGlobalProps

# 函数: useGlobalProps()

```ts
function useGlobalProps(): GlobalProps
```

A React Hooks for you to get `lynx.__globalProps`.
If `lynx.__globalProps` is changed, a re-render will be triggered automatically.

## 返回

[`GlobalProps`](/api/react/Interface.GlobalProps.mdx)

## 示例

```ts
function App() {
  const globalProps = useGlobalProps();

  globalProps.someProperty // use it
}
```
